fields.Name: Geocoding Maintenance
fields.Description: Runs on a recurring basis as a safety net for records that bypass BaseEntity.Save() (bulk SQL imports, direct DB operations). Live geocoding is handled inline during entity saves; this job finds and geocodes missing rows, retries failed attempts, and cleans up orphaned RecordGeoCode rows. Default cadence is weekly (Saturdays 2 AM UTC); administrators can adjust the CronExpression as needed.
